close_reason: Added :now and :duration_ms options to Lease.new/3, updated Store and tests to use keyword syntax
description:
## File
`apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/lease.ex`

## Current Code (lines 34-51)
```elixir
def new(%Item{} = item, holder, duration_ms) when is_integer(duration_ms) do
  now = System.system_time(:millisecond)
  expires_at = now + duration_ms
  # ...
end
```

## Required Changes
Accept `:now` in keyword opts form:
```elixir
def new(%Item{} = item, holder, opts) when is_list(opts) do
  duration = Keyword.get(opts, :duration_ms, @default_lease_duration_ms)
  now = Keyword.get(opts, :now, System.system_time(:millisecond))
  expires_at = now + duration
  # ...
end
```

Keep the integer-only variant for backwards compatibility:
```elixir
def new(%Item{} = item, holder, duration_ms) when is_integer(duration_ms) do
  new(item, holder, duration_ms: duration_ms)
end
```

## Impact
- Tests can pass `now: fixed_time` to get deterministic lease creation
- Eliminates need for struct manipulation in tests
title: Add :now injection to Lease.new/3
